title: Add description field to searchHomepageProducts backend response

requirements.text: Modify the `searchHomepageProducts` function in `backend/main.mo` to include the `description` field in each returned product record. All existing functionality must be preserved: maximum 10 results limit, numeric-only barcode search logic, mixed-input name/description search logic, case-insensitive matching, partial substring matching, and all other currently returned product fields. The function signature and overall response structure must remain unchanged.

quotes: The backend `searchHomepageProducts` function currently does not return the description field in its response
Modify the function to include the product description field in the returned data

acceptanceCriteria: The `searchHomepageProducts` function returns a `description` field for each product in its results.
The returned description value matches the description stored for the product.
The maximum 10 results limit is still enforced.
Numeric-only queries still trigger barcode search logic.
Mixed-input queries still search by product name and description.
Search remains case-insensitive and supports partial substring matching.
All other previously returned product fields are still present in the response.
Opening the product details modal from a search result dropdown now displays the product description.
The description shown when opening the modal from a search result matches the description shown when opening the modal from a homepage product card.

constraints: Do not modify any frontend components, styling, or layout.
Do not modify frontend/index.css — preserve all :root CSS custom property blocks including all theme color variables, their exact names, values, and structure.
Do not alter the `searchHomepageProducts` function signature or overall response structure beyond adding the description field.
All existing search logic and result limits must remain intact.
nonGoals: Changes to any other backend functions.
Modifications to the product details modal component.
Changes to the Spanish interface or any UI copy.
Adding any new fields beyond description to the searchHomepageProducts response.
